prevalence.trend: stable; rotavirus vaccination reduces infant burden

burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate in children; low mortality overall
burden.mortalityRate: Low to moderate in vulnerable populations

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical diagnosis; stool testing in outbreaks or severe cases

publicHealthSystem.estimatedPatients: Tens of millions of episodes annually
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate; depends on early ORS and care access

regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: ORS, zinc in children, IV fluids for severe cases
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Sanitation gaps and outbreak control in crowded settings
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Rotavirus vaccine coverage and ORS availability
